titleStmt.title: SII 6.1068: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1068. (A.R. No. 332-LVIII of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . yacchāritramanādibhūpacaritapraspaṁdilōkāṁcitaṁ yadgōtraṁ kamalānivāsamaniśaṁ kā
ṁtāmanōvallabhaṁ . yatkī¨rtiḥ tridaśādivāsataṭinīkallōlakūlaṁkaṣā sōyaṁ śrī haricaṁdanō vijayatē śrīrāmadēvā
tmajaḥ . 1 śākēvyōmanidhidvicaṁdragaṇitē va¨rṣē tathā kā¨rttikē kṛṣṇē kṛṣṇadinē mahījadivasē śrīsiṁhaśailēśituḥ . A
grē dīpamakhaṁḍamāśaśidinēśaṁ tasya saṁsiddhayē sōyaṁ ṅñāniśirōmaṇi¨rgguṇanidhiḥ prādādgavāṁ saptatiṁ . 2
pradīpapratimāmēkāṁ gōpāḷaṁ cāsya vṛttayē . khārīmitāṁ bhuvaṁ prādāt svābhīṣṭaphalasiddhayē . 3
śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1290 Agunēṁṭi kā¨rttika bahuḷa Ēkādaśiyu maṁgaḷavāramunāṁḍu
kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa jaḷēsvaraharicaṁdramahāpatruṁḍu tanaku nabhīṣṭā¨rtthasiddhigānu śrīnarasiṁha
nāthuni sannidhiyaṁdu nityamunnu Oka Akhaṁḍadīpamu veluṁguṭakuṁ beṭṭina mōdālu ḍebai 70 .
dīpapratima Okaṭi 1 Ī mōdālaṁ gāci dīpalasamasyanu neI tecci peṭṭanu gōrāpurāIkhillā
ri koḍku siṁgirikillārikiṁ bhaṁḍārānanu padmanidhi padi māḍalu veṭṭi bidurisiṁgiyaṁdu
la khaṁḍika puṭṭaṁḍu kṣētramu vilicipeṭṭenu . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dha¨rmmaḥ pālanīyō ma
nīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hiśatruḥ syādda¨rmmaḥ śatru¨rnna kasyacit . Ī dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava ra
kṣaḥ . Ī dha¨rmmuvu Ācaṁdrā[¨r*]kkasthahigaṁ cellaṁgaladu śrīśrīśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1068 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
